name: part_005
file: tmp_【Sneak Peak】hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future【#holoIDChromaticFuture 】 [GvDwA90OOuU]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_005.webm

scenes.description: MC segment featuring Kobo Kanaeru, Moona Hoshinova, and Pavolia Reine discussing their performance and interacting with the fans.
Performance of 'Chromatic Future', the 5th-anniversary theme song.

subtitles.original: Untung lagunya santai, easy listening,
subtitles.english: Fortunately, the song was chill and easy listening,

subtitles.original: jadi kita sambil keliling-keliling kan, nyapa fans, gitu ya?
subtitles.english: so we could walk around and greet the fans, right?

subtitles.original: Asik banget ya tadi ya?
subtitles.english: It was really fun, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: Aku juga suka banget tadi dance bagian ref-nya ya?
subtitles.english: I also really liked the dance during the chorus.

subtitles.original: Da la da la da la da la da da la da da...
subtitles.english: Da la da la da la da la da da la da da...

subtitles.original: Itu... itu beda lagu gak sih?
subtitles.english: Wait... isn't that a different song?

subtitles.original: Gak gitu...
subtitles.english: Not like that...

subtitles.original: Da la da la da la da la da da la da da...
subtitles.english: Da la da la da la da la da da la da da...

subtitles.original: Enggak gitu kah?
subtitles.english: Is it not?

subtitles.original: Ya tapi pokoknya asik lah ya kalau nyanyi lagu chill santai-santai kayak gini.
subtitles.english: But anyway, it's fun to sing chill, relaxed songs like this.

subtitles.original: Iya santai dong. Tapi ngomongin soal santai, kita tuh sebenarnya belum bisa santai dulu.
subtitles.english: Yeah, chill for sure. But speaking of relaxing, we can't actually relax just yet.

subtitles.original: Hei, santai!
subtitles.english: Hey, relax!

subtitles.original: Katanya nggak boleh santai-santai!
subtitles.english: I thought we weren't allowed to relax!

subtitles.original: Iya iya iya,
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah,

subtitles.original: jangan santai-santai, jangan terlalu santai.
subtitles.english: don't relax, don't be too relaxed.

subtitles.original: Karena konsernya tuh masih panjang!
subtitles.english: Because the concert is still long!

subtitles.original: Jadi sebelum itu kalian ada nggak yang mau kalian sampain dulu?
subtitles.english: So before that, is there anything you'd like to say?

subtitles.original: Mulai dari ini nih yang gak bisa diem.
subtitles.english: Starting with this one who can't stay still.

subtitles.original: Tiga kata saja:
subtitles.english: Just three words:

subtitles.original: I love you.
subtitles.english: I love you.

subtitles.original: Keren! The best! Sangat jelas ya.
subtitles.english: Cool! The best! Very clear, indeed.

subtitles.original: Tetap semangat, tetap semangat menjalani hidup ya. Udah gitu aja.
subtitles.english: Keep up the spirit, keep up the spirit in living life. That's all.

subtitles.original: Pokoknya sampai akhir masih panjang. Semangat!
subtitles.english: Anyway, it's still a long way to the end. Fighting!

subtitles.original: Sarangheyo! Gomawoyo!
subtitles.english: I love you! Thank you!

subtitles.original: Oke kalau aku, ya semangat selalu. Semangat santai.
subtitles.english: Okay for me, always keep up the spirit. Relaxed spirit.

subtitles.original: Hidup jangan terlalu dibawa serius.
subtitles.english: Don't take life too seriously.

subtitles.original: Semangat santai ya!
subtitles.english: Relaxed spirit, okay!

subtitles.original: Semangat santai apa tuh?
subtitles.english: What's 'relaxed spirit'?

subtitles.original: Oke kalau gitu kita lanjut ke...
subtitles.english: Okay then, let's move on to...

subtitles.original: Wait wait wait, tunggu dulu!
subtitles.english: Wait, wait, wait! Hold on!

subtitles.original: Sebelum selesai-selesai ini nih ya,
subtitles.english: Before we finish up here,

subtitles.original: kita teriak bareng-bareng penonton dulu gak sih?
subtitles.english: shouldn't we shout together with the audience?

subtitles.original: Iya ayo!
subtitles.english: Yeah, let's do it!

subtitles.original: Ayo ayo!
subtitles.english: Come on, come on!

subtitles.original: Oke oke. Jadi kita teriak bareng ya. Dalam hitungan tiga,
subtitles.english: Okay, okay. So let's shout together. On the count of three,

subtitles.original: kita sama-sama teriak 'Chromatic Future'. Oke ya?
subtitles.english: we'll all shout 'Chromatic Future'. Got it?

subtitles.original: Oke oke! Chromatic... Chromatic Future! Gitu kan ya?
subtitles.english: Okay, okay! Chromatic... Chromatic Future! Like that, right?

subtitles.original: Oke oke! Chromatic... Chromatic Future! Gitu kan ya?
subtitles.english: Okay, okay! Chromatic... Chromatic Future! Like that, right?

subtitles.original: Iya iya kayak gitu, kayak gitu.
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, like that, like that.

subtitles.original: Oke langsung ya, sambil lihat sini sini sini! Sambil lihat!
subtitles.english: Okay, right away, while looking here, here, here! While looking!

subtitles.original: Aku ya aku aku, aku yang penonton ini nih, penonton sini nih!
subtitles.english: Me, me, me! I'm with these fans, the fans over here!

subtitles.original: Aku ini deh, yang tengah yang tengah! Halo!
subtitles.english: I'll take this one, the middle one! Hello!

subtitles.original: Oke bareng-bareng ya! Satu, dua, tiga!
subtitles.english: Okay, all together! One, two, three!

subtitles.original: Chromatic Future!
subtitles.english: Chromatic Future!

subtitles.english: I spread my wings and let my magic unfold
